home.intro: By Rabeb Chekir — an architectural practice working at the intersection of brutal materiality and quiet luxury.
home.selected_h: A portfolio of considered, material architecture.
home.philosophy_quote: “We design with the patience of stone and the intent of light. Every wall is a decision; every void, a promise. Architecture, for us, is a quiet form of storytelling.”
home.studio_p: RAAR is a small studio committed to long projects. We work on a limited number of commissions each year so that every wall, every joint, and every shadow can be designed with intent.
home.ai_p: Describe a site, a brief, a feeling. Receive an indicative budget, timeline and consultation path — generated live.
home.ai_demo: Estimating · 320 m² minimal villa · Tunis hillside · stone + lime render · timeline 14–18 months · indicative budget €620k–€840k
home.cta_h: Have a site, a story, or a question?

about.label: The Studio
about.intro_h: An architect drawn to the silent gesture — a wall, a void, a long shadow at four o'clock.
about.intro_p1: Rabeb Chekir founded RAAR after a decade of practice across Mediterranean residential and cultural projects. The studio is deliberately small: a focused atelier where each commission is personally shepherded from first sketch to final detail.
about.intro_p2: Trained between Tunis and Paris, Rabeb's work draws on the vernacular intelligence of North African courtyard architecture and the precision of European modernism — a vocabulary of light, stone, and proportion.
about.philosophy_q: We believe architecture is the slow art of organising silence — of making rooms that hold a person and seasons that hold a building.
about.pillar1_d: Stone, timber, and lime — used honestly, allowed to age, never disguised.
about.pillar2_d: Each plan is drawn around the path of the sun. Light is not decoration but structure.
about.pillar3_d: Restraint over ornament. We prefer one beautiful gesture to ten loud ones.

contact.label: Contact
contact.name: Your name
contact.placeholder: Tell us about your site, your story, your timeline…

estimator.label: Estimator
estimator.title: Get a design estimate.
estimator.intro: A conversational assistant trained on RAAR's typical scope ranges. Indicative only — every site and brief is unique.
estimator.welcome: Welcome. I'm RAAR's estimating assistant — I can give you an indicative budget and timeline for your project. To start: **what kind of space are you imagining**, and roughly **how large** is it?
estimator.err_rate: Rate limit reached. Try again shortly.

quotation.label: Quotation
quotation.title: Request a formal quotation.
quotation.intro: Tell us a bit more so we can prepare a tailored quotation. We typically respond within 48 hours.
quotation.thanks_p: We've received your quotation request and will get back to you within 48 hours.
